latin: Novus praefectus in oppidum parvum advenit. cives eum viderunt et obstupuerunt — numquam talem praefectum habuerant. unus ex eis dixit: 'praefectus novus prope est — tabernas praeparate!'

questions.prompt: How do the townspeople react to the new sheriff?
questions.target: They are astonished — they've never had one like him
choices: They are astonished — they've never had one like him

questions.target: A small town in the Old West
choices: A small town in the Old West

translation: A new sheriff arrived in a small town. The citizens saw him and were astonished — they had never had such a sheriff. One of them said: 'The new sheriff is near — prepare the establishments!'
